title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology discusses OpenClaw security risks in autonomous AI agents, covering vulnerabilities such as prompt injection and credential exposure. The analysis examines how agent autonomy, tools, and memory create real-world security threats and offers guidance on safer deployment practices.
